title: leleba rumphiana var. amahussana
intro: Leleba rumphiana var. amahussana, also known as the Amahussana variety of Leleba rumphiana, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is reported to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, Leleba rumphiana var. amahussana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
